facebook.caption:
POV: you finally found the good Bún Quậy.

Bún quậy THIỆN MỸ on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo is where locals actually eat. 4.7 stars across 401 reviews. That's not luck, that's consistency.

Bún Quậy is Phu Quoc's own noodle dish. You won't find it like this back home. Order it, stir it, eat it fast.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Chopsticks hit the bowl. Broth steams. This is Bún quậy THIỆN MỸ, 401 reviews deep and still packed at lunch. Phu Quoc's local noodle dish, done right. Don't walk past this one.
